evals.prompt: 帮我查一下我在 Base 链上有多少 USDC
evals.expected_output: Agent should: install wallet if needed, unlock session, run balance command with --chain base --asset usdc, present result with [QUERY] tag, then lock
Agent should: ensure wallet installed, unlock, confirm with user before sending (show [TX] confirmation), run send command with correct chain/amount/to, show tx hash with explorer link, lock

evals.prompt: 我的钱包地址是什么？我还没装过钱包
evals.expected_output: Agent should: detect wallet not installed, run install.sh, init wallet, run receive to get address, show address with [WALLET] tag. Should NOT ask for password.
